name: Path Traversal via path.join
description: path.join and path.resolve with untrusted input can lead to directory traversal.
rationale: When user input is passed directly to path operations, '../' sequences can escape the intended directory. Validate and sanitize inputs.
compliant_code:
const safe = path.normalize(req.query.file).replace(/^(\.\.(\/|\\|$))+/, '');
const p = path.join(baseDir, safe);
